title: Top 50 English-language news sites in the world: Indian news sites see biggest declines in June - Press Gazette
summary: A recent analysis of the top English-language news websites globally reveals a significant decline in traffic for Indian news platforms during June. This shift indicates evolving digital consumption habits and increased competition within the international media landscape.

title: What’s happening this week in economics? - Deloitte
summary: Deloitte has published its weekly economic review, outlining key financial developments and upcoming events expected to shape global markets. The report offers crucial insights into potential policy shifts and their broader implications for international commerce.

title: Media Startup ‘World & New World Journal’ Redefines Global Current Affairs with 7-Language Service - News-Press NOW
summary: A new media startup, 'World & New World Journal,' is launching a groundbreaking service that delivers global current affairs content in seven languages. This initiative aims to enhance accessibility and foster a more diverse understanding of international events across different linguistic communities.

title: BBC World Service to launch new language offers in Hungarian and Romanian - BBC
summary: The BBC World Service is expanding its international broadcasting efforts by introducing new services tailored for Hungarian and Romanian speakers. This strategic move aims to broaden access to reliable news and information for these communities, reinforcing global media diversity.

title: MeitY secretary says every social media user posting on current affairs can come under I&B oversight - ThePrint
summary: A senior government official recently stated that all social media users discussing current affairs could fall under the purview of the Information and Broadcasting Ministry. This declaration signals a potential expansion of regulatory oversight over digital content and public discourse in India.

title: Communalism in India, Meaning, Causes, Effects, UPSC Notes - Vajiram & Ravi
summary: Communalism remains a significant challenge in India, characterized by the politicization of religious identity and inter-group tensions. Understanding its historical roots, contributing factors, and societal impacts is crucial for fostering national unity and social harmony.

title: What Do I, as an Indian Christian, Expect from My Indian Government? - Goa Chronicle
summary: An Indian Christian perspective outlines key expectations from the government, focusing on religious freedom, equal rights, and protection from discrimination. This article highlights the ongoing dialogue about minority rights and secular governance within the diverse fabric of Indian society.

title: How the Tenth Schedule regulates political defections - The Indian Express
summary: The Tenth Schedule of the Indian Constitution, commonly known as the anti-defection law, plays a critical role in maintaining political stability by deterring legislators from switching parties. This legal framework aims to prevent opportunistic defections that could undermine electoral mandates and government majorities.

title: Social Issues in India, Poverty, Caste, Top 10 Problems List - Vajiram & Ravi
summary: India continues to grapple with a range of pressing social issues, including persistent poverty and the complexities of the caste system. Addressing these deep-seated challenges is essential for achieving inclusive growth and ensuring equitable opportunities for all citizens.

title: IMF warns inflation threat looms large over global economy - Financial Times
summary: The International Monetary Fund has issued a significant warning about the persistent threat of inflation impacting the global economy. This ongoing challenge could undermine economic stability and growth prospects worldwide.

title: Debt, AI boom and economic fragilities raise global risks, BIS says - CNBC
summary: The Bank for International Settlements has identified rising global debt and the rapid growth of artificial intelligence as key factors elevating worldwide economic risks. These elements contribute to a more fragile international financial landscape.

title: Oil prices and AI investment play major role in the US economic forecast for 2026–2031 - Deloitte
summary: Deloitte's economic forecast highlights that both fluctuating oil prices and substantial investments in artificial intelligence will be critical in shaping the US economy through 2031. These factors are expected to drive significant shifts in economic performance and development.

title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise as chip stocks rebound, oil prices fall - Yahoo Finance
summary: Major stock indices, including the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq, experienced gains today, driven by a strong rebound in chip manufacturing stocks. This positive market movement was further supported by a notable decline in global oil prices.

title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones, S&P 500 Futures Fall as Investors Await SK Hynix Debut and US Reportedly M - Benzinga
summary: Futures for the Dow Jones and S&P 500 saw declines as investors awaited the market debut of SK Hynix. This cautious sentiment also reflected reactions to recent reports regarding potential US policy shifts.

title: MARKET_TICKER
Buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends three stocks to buy on Monday - 13 July 2026 - livemint.com
summary: A market expert has provided specific recommendations for three stocks, advising investors on potential buy or sell opportunities for the upcoming trading week. These insights aim to guide traders in making informed decisions as the market opens on Monday, July 13th.

title: BSE turns 151: How Asia’s oldest stock exchange became India’s market pulse - The Times of India
summary: The Bombay Stock Exchange recently celebrated its 151st anniversary, marking a significant milestone as Asia's oldest stock exchange. This occasion highlights its enduring legacy and pivotal role in shaping India's financial landscape over more than a century.

title: Stock market today: Sensex gains over 200 points, Nifty 50 ends above 23,950; investors earn ₹5 lakh crore in a day - livemint.com
summary: Indian benchmark indices closed positively on July 9th, with the Sensex advancing over 200 points and the Nifty 50 settling above the 23,950 mark. This upward movement resulted in investors collectively gaining approximately ₹5 lakh crore in wealth during the trading session.

title: AI in Fintech Market Size, Industry Share, Forecast to 2034 - Fortune Business Insights
summary: The global market for AI in Fintech is projected for significant expansion, driven by increasing adoption across financial services. This growth is expected to continue through 2034, indicating a robust future for artificial intelligence applications in the sector.

title: AI in Fintech: Use Cases, Stats, and Adoption Challenges - appinventiv.com
summary: Artificial intelligence is transforming fintech through various applications, from fraud detection to personalized banking experiences. Despite its potential, the sector faces hurdles in widespread adoption, including data privacy concerns and integration complexities.

title: Fintech Banking: 16 Fintech Banks and Neobanks to Know 2026 - Built In
summary: The fintech banking landscape continues to evolve rapidly, with numerous neobanks and digital-first institutions redefining traditional financial services. This overview highlights key players shaping the future of banking in 2026.

title: Nigeria Central Bank Mandates AI Tools for AML Monitoring - Dabafinance
summary: The Central Bank of Nigeria has issued a directive requiring financial institutions to implement AI-powered tools for anti-money laundering (AML) monitoring. This move underscores a growing global trend towards leveraging advanced technology to combat financial crime and enhance regulatory compliance.

title: Fintech & AI: The Rise of Embedded Finance in Everyday Platforms - intlbm
summary: Embedded finance, powered by AI, is increasingly integrating financial services directly into non-financial platforms and daily activities. This trend allows users to access banking, lending, and payment solutions seamlessly within their existing digital ecosystems.

title: How banks are using AI in financial crime and compliance - FinTech Global
summary: Financial institutions are increasingly deploying artificial intelligence to bolster their defenses against financial crime and streamline compliance processes. AI algorithms are proving instrumental in identifying suspicious patterns, detecting fraud, and ensuring adherence to complex regulatory frameworks.

title: Much of the world seems more enthusiastic about AI than Americans, a poll finds - marketplace.org
summary: A recent global survey indicates that enthusiasm for artificial intelligence is notably higher in many parts of the world compared to the United States. This suggests varying public perceptions and adoption rates of AI technologies across different regions.

title: India’s AI Revolution Accelerates as Billion-Dollar Investments Reshape the Artificial Intelligence Market - Spherical Insights
summary: India is experiencing a significant acceleration in its artificial intelligence sector, fueled by substantial investments totaling billions of dollars. These financial injections are rapidly transforming the nation's AI market and fostering innovation.

title: India’s hosts AI Impact Summit, drawing world leaders, tech giants - Al Jazeera
summary: India recently hosted a significant AI Impact Summit, attracting prominent world leaders and major technology corporations. This event underscored India's growing influence in the global artificial intelligence landscape and its commitment to shaping future AI policies.

title: India Issues 2025 AI Governance Guidelines- How It Compares to Other Global AI Acts - The National Law Review
summary: India has released its 2025 AI Governance Guidelines, establishing a framework for responsible artificial intelligence development and deployment. This move positions India alongside other nations in the global effort to regulate AI technologies.

title: India’s Global AI Pitch Masks A Troubling Reality At Home - Tech Policy Press
summary: While India actively promotes its global leadership in artificial intelligence, a critical analysis suggests underlying domestic challenges and ethical concerns. This perspective highlights the complexities of balancing international aspirations with internal societal impacts of AI.

title: Generative AI’s environmental footprint poses difficult tradeoffs for agrifood systems in low- and middle-income countries - IFPRI
summary: The environmental impact of generative AI presents significant challenges for agrifood systems, particularly in low- and middle-income nations. Addressing these ecological footprints requires careful consideration of trade-offs between technological advancement and sustainable development.
